scripts.check: tsx -e "import{getDb,closeDb}from'@semantic-cve/db';getDb();const d=getDb();const c=d.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM cves').get().c;const e=d.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM embeddings WHERE vector IS NOT NULL').get().c;const h=d.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM hashes').get().c;console.log('CVEs='+c+' Embeddings='+e+' Hashes='+h);closeDb();"
